rows.label: qev051303_MSG0001
rows.name:
You are [ST:playername ], correct?
It seems you were quite active during
that recent incident with the Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051303_MSG0002
rows.name:
I wish to rely on your skills for a request.
I would very much like you to meet my master.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051303_MSG0003
rows.name: Given the nature of the request, we wish to avoid the public eye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051303_MSG0004
rows.name:
Please come to the Industrial Area
late at night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051303_MSG0005
rows.name:
It should be a profitable arrangement for you as well.
I assure you it will not be a wasted trip.[ST:wait ]
